description:
An intuitive diagram software with templates for any scenario.

EdrawMax is a powerful, all-in-one, and yet easy-to-use diagramming tool that enables users to visualize the ideas effortlessly. With EdrawMax, you can create and customize flowcharts, Venn diagrams, mind maps, organizational charts, Gantt charts, UML diagrams, electrical drawings, genograms, building plans, etc.
Symbol Library ImprovementsSymbol library search now includes community results for more efficient resource discoverySupports creating custom cloud symbol libraries directly, with grouping for better organization

Floor Plan ImprovementsSupports editing dimensions of walls and objects at the bottom of the canvas, improving efficiency

Export image and PDF optimization
Supports batch export: multiple files can be selected and exported as images or PDFs with one click
Supports paginated export: when exporting images or PDFs, content can be automatically paginated based on page size to improve layout

AI Agent optimization
Optimized layout for AI-generated flowcharts, making structures clearer
Added support for sub-process parsing to better represent complex workflows

Image Editing Enhancements
Added element-level image editing on the image menu bar, enabling one-click separation of layers and text for precise adjustments and flexible creation

Other Improvements
Supports importing and using local templates and symbol libraries in offline environments
Added default image insertion settings, with an option to disable image compression when inserting images
Auto-generated org charts support setting text alignment within cardsSet file name when creating a new local file
